description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:alpine Docker image. In the global before_script install mkdocs, mkdocs-material, and pymdown-extensions with pip. Define a pages job that runs in the default stage, executes the shell commands "mkdocs build", "mv site public", and "mv redirects public", publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch via an only rule.
